Privacy Policy — VatView

Live VATSIM tracking on an interactive map — for iOS and Android.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

VatView is a free mobile app for tracking live VATSIM network activity. This policy explains what data is collected and how it is used.

What Data We Collect

VatView does not require an account and does not collect any personally identifiable information directly.

Crash Reports

VatView uses Firebase Crashlytics to collect crash reports when the app encounters an error. This may include:

  • Device model and operating system version
  • App version
  • Stack trace of the crash

This data is used solely to identify and fix bugs.

Analytics

VatView uses Google Analytics for Firebase to collect anonymous usage data, including:

  • Which screens are viewed
  • Which features are used (e.g. map filters, detail panels)

No personally identifiable information is included in analytics events.

Map Data

VatView uses Google Maps to render the map. Google’s standard privacy policy applies to map tile requests. No user location data is collected or transmitted by VatView.

VATSIM Data

Live VATSIM network data (pilot callsigns, positions, ATC controllers) is fetched from the public VATSIM data feed. This data is public and not collected or stored by VatView.

Data Storage

All app preferences and cached data (map region, filter settings, airport database) are stored locally on your device. Nothing is transmitted to VatView servers.

Third-Party Services

VatView uses the following third-party services, each with their own privacy policies:

  • Google Play Services
  • Firebase Crashlytics
  • Google Analytics for Firebase
  • Google Maps
  • VATSIM

Children’s Privacy

VatView does not knowingly collect any information from children under the age of 13.

Changes to This Policy

This policy may be updated from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

Contact

Questions about this privacy policy? Contact: o4orendev@gmail.com

This page was generated by GitHub Pages.
